simple_types.name: Data_Phase_Transfer_Direction
EP_Type
simple_types.code: type EP_Type is (Control, Isochronous, Bulk, Interrupt);

simple_types.name: Request_Type_Recipient
simple_types.code: type Request_Type_Recipient is (Dev, Iface, Endpoint, Other);

simple_types.name: Request_Type_Type
simple_types.code:
type Request_Type_Type is (Stand, Class, Vendor, Reserved)
  with Size => 2;

array_types.name: USB_String
array_types.code: type USB_String is array (String_Range range <>) of Character;

record_types.name: Device_Descriptor
Device_Qualifier
EP_Addr
Request_Type
Setup_Data
String_Descriptor
String_Descriptor_Zero

documentation.description:
The maximum length of a string is limited by the the bLength field of the
String Descriptor. This field is one byte: 0 .. 255, but bLength encodes
to total size of the descriptor including the bLenght and bDescriptorType
fields (one byte each). So the remaining length for string is 255 - 2.
Convert Ada ASCII string to USB UTF16 string
